// M.g.cs
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
partial class M
{
    public static global::Order Map(global::OrderRequest src)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(src);
        return new global::Order(
            Id: src.Id,
            Customer: Map(src.Customer)
        );
    }
    public static global::Customer Map(global::CustomerRequest src)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(src);
        return new global::Customer(
            Name: src.Name
        );
    }
}
